description_long: This is a classic ceramic teapot with a smooth, matte beige finish and a rounded, bulbous body. The teapot features a gently curved spout extending from one side and a large, ergonomic loop handle on the opposite side, both seamlessly integrated into the main body. The lid is circular with a small, rounded knob at the top for easy removal, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. On one side of the teapot, there is a colorful decorative logo with the words 'Blender' and a stylized eye, adding a playful and modern touch to the otherwise minimalist design. The overall form is simple and functional, with no additional surface embellishments apart from the logo. This teapot is well-suited for serving tea in both domestic and casual urban settings.
description: A smooth, beige ceramic teapot with a rounded body, curved spout, loop handle, and a colorful 'Blender' logo on one side. The design is minimalist and functional with a snug-fitting lid.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the teapot, highlighting the curved spout and large loop handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the circular lid and the alignment of the spout and handle.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the 'Blender' logo and the spout, with the handle visible on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle, with the spout mostly hidden from sight.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is gently curved, angled slightly upward, and positioned at the front of the teapot's rounded body.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, smooth loop attached at the upper and lower rear of the teapot, forming an ergonomic arch for easy gripping.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; the lid is circular, slightly domed, with a small rounded knob and fits snugly into the opening.
attribute_decorative_patterns: A colorful 'Blender' logo with stylized text and an eye motif on one side; otherwise plain.
